channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australians safely repatriated from the Middle East amid ongoing conflict
item.description: The first group of Australians stranded in the Middle East due to escalating conflict has safely returned to Sydney, marking the beginning of a broader repatriation effort for over 115,000 Australians...

item.title: Pakistan Announces Emergency Steps on Fuel Pricing Amid Strait of Hormuz Closure Crisis
item.description: Pakistan is preparing to implement several urgent steps to handle the petroleum sector challenges caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz following recent regional conflict involving US, Israel,...

item.title: US Announces Deeper Strikes on Iran as Conflict Expands Regionally with Retaliatory Attacks and Evacuations
item.description: The US and Israel continue intensive military operations against Iran on the fifth day of the conflict, which began with joint airstrikes on February 28 targeting Iranian leadership, nuclear sites, mi...

item.title: X launches X Money beta with William Shatner auctioning invites for charity
item.description: X, the social media platform formerly known as Twitter, has started offering limited beta access to its new payments service, X Money. Instead of distributing invites traditionally, X owner Elon Musk ...

item.title: Transitioning Brick Kilns in India: Cleaner Technology, Unchanged Worker Struggles
item.description: India’s construction boom is driving growth in the brick industry, making it one of the largest employers after agriculture. In Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, traditional brick kilns are gradually converting ...

item.title: Household fuels linked to eczema and severe asthma in children in South African townships
item.description: In the townships of Mabopane and Soshanguve on the northern outskirts of Tshwane, many families rely on gas stoves, paraffin heaters, or wood and coal fires when electricity is unavailable or unafford...

item.title: How My Kenyanness Helped Me Thrive as a Teacher in New York
item.description: Njeri Gachathi shares her experience teaching first grade in New York City and how being Kenyan shaped her approach to education. Initially, she felt her African identity made her stand out in a predo...

item.title: Churchill’s Perspective on Iran: Balancing Diplomacy, Strength, and Anglo-American Relations
item.description: The article examines how Winston Churchill might have viewed a potential conflict with Iran, highlighting the complexity of his strategic thinking. While Donald Trump invoked Churchill to criticise Ke...

item.title: Alleged GTA Criminal Brian Da Costa Granted Bail Amid Police Corruption Investigation
item.description: Brian Da Costa, 43, an alleged drug trafficker in the Greater Toronto Area, has been granted $1.5 million bail and will be released under strict conditions, including house arrest with three sureties,...

item.title: CDF Munir Says Afghan Taliban Must Stop Supporting Terrorism for Peace with Pakistan
item.description: Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of Army Staff (COAS) Field Marshal Asim Munir has clearly stated that lasting peace between Pakistan and Afghanistan is not possible unless the Afghan Taliban r...

item.title: Tanzania Celebrates Global Recognition of Kiswahili Language and Singeli Music
item.description: DODOMA: The Deputy Permanent Secretary at the Ministry of Information, Culture, Arts, and Sports, Methusela Ntonda, highlighted major achievements for the 2025/26 financial year during the inauguratio...

item.title: PCSO Lotto Draws on March 4 Have No Jackpot Winners
item.description: On Wednesday, March 4, 2026, the major lottery draws conducted by the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) did not produce any jackpot winners. In the Megalotto 6/45, no player matched the win...

item.title: Texas Senate race pits Ken Paxton against John Cornyn in a high‑stakes GOP primary runoff
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton and longtime U.S. Senator John Cornyn are advancing to a May 26 primary runoff for the Republican nomination in Texas’s Senate race, setting up a bitter intra‑party s...

item.title: Female Engineer Killed by Former Partner in Catarman, Brother Injured
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Catarman, Northern Samar, where 25-year-old engineer Karen Grace Corsino was shot dead by her former partner, identified as Sgt. Jerome Lluz Tejero, an active member of t...

item.title: IS Sahel Kills Civilians in Western Niger Villages
item.description: For Niger, wahala don dey as Islamist armed group, Islamic State in the Sahel (IS Sahel), don kill 30 civilians including 4 pikin dem, plus 5 captured fighters, for two separate attacks wey happen sin...

item.title: Laura Anderson and Sam Gowland manage to leave Dubai amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Laura Anderson successfully secured a flight from Dubai to Edinburgh with her two-year-old daughter Bonnie amid escalating tensions in the Middle East, caused by a series of missile strikes and retali...

item.title: Challenges for the U.S. in Reducing China’s Control of Critical Mineral Supply Chains
item.description: The U.S. recently hosted a critical minerals summit aimed at reducing China's dominant role in the global supply of essential minerals used in smartphones, weapons systems, lithium-ion batteries, and ...

item.title: Congress announces first list of 42 candidates for Assam assembly elections, Gaurav Gogoi to contest from Jorhat
item.description: On March 3, 2026, the Congress party in Assam released its first list of 42 candidates for the upcoming elections to the 126-member Assam assembly. This makes Congress the first political party in the...

item.title: TikTok Confirms It Will Not Implement End-to-End Encryption for Direct Messages Over Safety Concerns
item.description: TikTok has decided not to introduce end-to-end encryption (E2EE) for direct messages on its platform, according to a report by the BBC. The company stated that implementing E2EE would make it more dif...

item.title: Examining the legality and implications of US-Israeli military actions against Iran
item.description: The article critiques the double standards often applied to international law, particularly in relation to military actions by powerful countries. It raises questions about the legality of former Pres...
